title: R-0018: Regime comparator — Old Regime is better when large deductions available

expected_output.flag_for_explanation: Taxpayer may benefit from Old Regime — verify deduction eligibility.

notes: Salary ₹15L with large deductions (80C + 80CCD(1B) + HRA + 80D = ₹4.3L). Old Regime taxable income is significantly lower, making it more tax-efficient. Engine must recommend Old Regime and flag deduction eligibility for the Explanation Engine. Deduction amounts used here are placeholders for Wave 3B computation.
